manifest.description: Steelsearch/OpenSearch supported search compatibility fixture manifest.

bulk_payloads.name: logs_bulk
bulk_payloads.format: application/x-ndjson index actions with explicit _id values

bulk_payloads.name: vectors_bulk
bulk_payloads.format: application/x-ndjson index actions with explicit _id values

bulk_payloads.name: vectors_cosine_bulk
bulk_payloads.format: application/x-ndjson index actions with explicit _id values

bulk_payloads.name: vectors_innerproduct_bulk
bulk_payloads.format: application/x-ndjson index actions with explicit _id values

expected_error_cases.name: bad_knn_vector_dimension
expected_error_cases.reason: Executable comparison is added with error normalization to avoid vendor-specific message text.

cases.name: create_data_stream_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch does not implement OpenSearch data streams yet and fails closed with an explicit compatibility error.

cases.name: get_data_stream_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch keeps data stream read APIs explicit and unsupported until backing-index generation and lifecycle semantics exist.

cases.name: rollover_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch does not yet implement rollover aliases or data stream generation updates.

cases.name: cat_indices_text_parameters_skip
cases.reason: OpenSearch cat text formatting and verbose column rendering are intentionally skipped until Steelsearch implements non-JSON cat output.

cases.name: cluster_health_wait_parameters_skip
cases.reason: Steelsearch reports current health but does not yet implement OpenSearch wait_for_status or timeout blocking semantics.

cases.name: allocation_explain_development_shape
cases.reason: Steelsearch exposes a development allocation decision without requiring the OpenSearch request body yet.

cases.name: highlight_option_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch fail-closes highlight until fetch-subphase and fragment rendering semantics match OpenSearch.

cases.name: suggest_option_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch fail-closes suggest until completion/term/phrase suggestion semantics are implemented.

cases.name: scroll_option_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch fail-closes scroll until stateful traversal semantics are implemented.

cases.name: pit_option_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch fail-closes PIT until point-in-time snapshot lifecycle semantics are implemented.

cases.name: runtime_mappings_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch fail-closes runtime_mappings until runtime field execution semantics are implemented.

cases.name: disallow_no_indices_empty_wildcard_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch now fails closed when allow_no_indices=false and a wildcard target resolves no indices.

cases.name: expand_wildcards_none_empty_search
cases.reason: Steelsearch treats expand_wildcards=none as an empty target set when allow_no_indices=true.

cases.name: expand_wildcards_closed_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects closed wildcard expansion until closed-index engine state is implemented.

cases.name: highlight_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects highlight requests until highlight response parity is implemented.

cases.name: rescore_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects rescore requests until rescore execution and response parity are implemented.

cases.name: collapse_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects field collapse until grouped hit response semantics are implemented.

cases.name: suggest_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects suggesters until suggestion execution and response parity are implemented.

cases.name: pit_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects PIT search until point-in-time lifecycle APIs and reader pinning exist.

cases.name: search_after_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects search_after until sort value validation and pagination semantics are complete.

cases.name: scroll_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects scroll search until scroll context lifecycle and cleanup APIs are implemented.

cases.name: track_total_hits_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects track_total_hits until total-hit threshold response parity is implemented.

cases.name: terminate_after_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects terminate_after until early termination and shard metadata parity are implemented.

cases.name: timeout_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects search timeout until partial timeout accounting and response parity are implemented.

cases.name: explain_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects explain until per-hit explanation response parity is implemented.

cases.name: profile_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects profile until query/profile tree response parity is implemented.

cases.name: stored_fields_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects stored_fields until field loading response parity is implemented.

cases.name: docvalue_fields_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects docvalue_fields until docvalue field formatting parity is implemented.

cases.name: query_string_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects query_string until analyzer, default-field, and syntax parity are implemented.

cases.name: simple_query_string_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects simple_query_string until syntax, operator, and field expansion parity are implemented.

cases.name: function_score_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects function_score until score functions, boosts, and score-mode parity are implemented.

cases.name: script_score_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects script_score until script execution, sandboxing, and scoring parity are implemented.

cases.name: nested_query_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects nested queries until nested document indexing and inner-hit parity are implemented.

cases.name: geo_distance_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects geo_distance until geo-point indexing and distance calculation parity are implemented.

cases.name: regexp_query_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects regexp queries until automaton and rewrite semantics match OpenSearch.

cases.name: fuzzy_query_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects fuzzy queries until edit-distance, prefix, rewrite, and scoring parity are implemented.

cases.name: more_like_this_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects more_like_this until term-vector selection and similarity scoring parity are implemented.

cases.name: span_query_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects span queries until positional query execution and span response parity are implemented.

cases.name: scripted_metric_placeholder_aggregation
cases.reason: Steelsearch currently exposes scripted_metric as an explicit placeholder value surface rather than executing OpenSearch scripts.

cases.name: plugin_aggregation
cases.reason: Steelsearch plugin aggregations are extension surfaces and do not correspond to a native OpenSearch aggregation request.

cases.name: date_histogram_aggregation_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects date_histogram until bucket rounding and date interval parity are implemented.

cases.name: histogram_aggregation_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects histogram until numeric bucket boundary parity is implemented.

cases.name: range_aggregation_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects range aggregations until range bucket semantics are implemented.

cases.name: cardinality_aggregation_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects cardinality until approximate unique-count parity is implemented.

cases.name: terms_order_option_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects terms.order until deterministic bucket ordering parity is implemented.

cases.name: significant_terms_background_filter_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects significant_terms.background_filter until background-set parity is implemented.

cases.name: knn_warmup_budget_failure
cases.reason: Steelsearch exposes Rust-native k-NN memory breaker accounting; OpenSearch uses JVM/native plugin internals with non-portable byte accounting.

cases.name: knn_warmup_clear_cache_telemetry_shape
cases.reason: Steelsearch reports Rust-native warmup bytes and clear-cache released bytes that are intentionally not matched field-for-field against OpenSearch plugin internals.

cases.name: knn_unsupported_method_engine_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch parses OpenSearch k-NN engine declarations for compatibility but rejects FAISS execution in the Rust-native production path.

cases.name: knn_unsupported_mode_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects on_disk k-NN execution until compressed/on-disk vector semantics are implemented.

cases.name: knn_unsupported_method_parameters_fail_closed
cases.reason: Steelsearch rejects k-NN method parameters before execution because current native scoring does not yet honor HNSW construction/search parameters.
